title: eriogonum corymbosum var. humivagans
intro: Eriogonum corymbosum var. humivagans, also known as the mountain buckwheat, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum corymbosum var. humivagans include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
